TextView.android:text: ● GUIDE
⚠️ IMPORTANT NOTICES
Always use your RIGHT HAND for sign detection. Left-hand signs are not supported and will reduce accuracy significantly.
Sentence history is permanently deleted when you uninstall the app. Back up important sentences before uninstalling.
ISL ALPHABET CHART
All 26 ISL hand-sign letters (A–Z). Study and practise each gesture to improve detection accuracy. Save this chart to your phone for offline reference.
Tap the button below to download the chart.\nSaved to: Gallery ▸ Pictures ▸ ISL Vision
APP GUIDE — ALL CONTROLS
ACTION BUTTONS (Bottom Row)
Detect (Green · Large)
Starts sign capture. Tap once then hold your RIGHT hand still. ISLens needs 7 consistent frames before confirming a letter — the confidence bar shows live progress.
Delete (Orange)
Removes the last letter typed in the Current Word. Tap repeatedly to erase multiple letters one at a time.
Guide / Info (Purple)
Opens this page — ISL chart download, full app guide for all buttons and controls, project info, and legal details.
Add Word (Blue)
Appends the completed Current Word into the Sentence with a space, then clears the word field so you can spell the next word.
Clear All (Red)
Resets everything — clears the current word, the full sentence, and the detected sign display. Does NOT delete saved history.
TOP BAR ICONS (Top-Right)
Flash (Orange FAB — top right)
Toggles the rear camera torch on or off. Use in dim environments. Good lighting is the #1 factor in detection accuracy.
History (Purple FAB — top right)
Opens the full History page showing all manually saved sentences with date and time. You can search, delete individual entries, or clear all history.
Feedback (Green FAB — top right)
Opens the Feedback page. Rate the app and send suggestions or bug reports directly to the development team.
Settings (Orange · Rightmost — top right)
Customise the app: toggle Dark/Light mode, turn sound ON/OFF, pick your preferred notification click sound, and toggle vibration feedback.
SENTENCE CARD BUTTONS
Save in History (Orange · Next to sentence)
Manually saves the current sentence to History with date and time. History is NOT cleared on app close — only on uninstall.
Speak Word (Green speaker)
Reads the current word aloud using Text-to-Speech in the selected output language.
Speak Sentence (Blue speaker)
Reads the full built sentence aloud using Text-to-Speech in the selected output language.
TRANSLATION & SPEECH
Output Language (Right Button)

Tap to open the language picker and choose from 58 supported languages. ISLens detects signs as English letters — this controls how the result is translated and spoken aloud. Requires internet for translation.
All 58 Supported Languages

Afrikaans · Arabic · Belarusian · Bengali · Bulgarian · Catalan · Chinese · Croatian · Czech · Danish · Dutch · English · Esperanto · Estonian · Finnish · French · Galician · Georgian · German · Greek · Gujarati · Haitian Creole · Hebrew · Hindi · Hungarian · Icelandic · Indonesian · Irish · Italian · Japanese · Kannada · Korean · Latvian · Lithuanian · Macedonian · Malay · Maltese · Marathi · Norwegian · Persian · Polish · Portuguese · Romanian · Russian · Slovak · Slovenian · Spanish · Swahili · Swedish · Tagalog · Tamil · Telugu · Thai · Turkish · Ukrainian · Urdu · Vietnamese · Welsh
ABOUT THE PROJECT
Real-Time Indian Sign Language Recognition

ISLens is an on-device AI application that bridges the communication gap between the hearing-impaired community and the hearing world. It uses a custom-trained TensorFlow Lite model combined with Google MediaPipe Hand Landmark detection to recognise all 26 letters of the Indian Sign Language alphabet in real time — instantly, with no internet required for detection.
All sign detection runs entirely on-device, ensuring complete privacy and full offline availability. Internet is used only for optional translation (MyMemory API) and feedback.
● On-Device AI
● Real-Time
● No Internet
● 26 ISL Signs
● Text-to-Speech
TERMS & CONDITIONS
By using ISLens you agree to our Terms and Conditions. Please read them carefully before using the app.
• ISLens is provided for personal, non-commercial use only.
• The app is offered 'as-is'. We do not guarantee 100% detection accuracy in all conditions.
• You must not reverse-engineer, copy, or redistribute the app or its models.
• We reserve the right to update the app and these terms at any time.
PRIVACY POLICY
Your privacy matters to us. ISLens is designed to work fully offline for sign detection — your camera feed and sign-language data never leave your device.
🔒 No camera data is uploaded or stored on any server.
🔒 Sentence history is stored locally on your device only and is deleted when you uninstall the app.
🌐 Internet is used only for optional text translation (MyMemory API) and feedback submission. Sign detection is 100% offline.
📊 We do not collect analytics, usage statistics, or personal data.
Real-Time Indian Sign Language Recognition
© 2026 ISLens · All Rights Reserved
Unauthorised copying, distribution, or modification\nof this app is strictly prohibited.
